description_for_human: A modern real-time discussion platform for developers to share projects, ideas, and engage in community conversations.
description_for_model: Discuss is a web-based developer community platform. Users can create discussion posts and project sharing posts with GitHub links and live previews. Features include upvoting/downvoting, comments, hashtags for categorization, real-time updates, and search functionality. The platform uses Firebase Realtime Database for data persistence and supports both email/password and Google OAuth authentication.
